name: Dinosaur Egg
obtainMethod: Found in artifact spots, mine treasure rooms, or from Dinosaur Chickens
description: An ancient, petrified egg. Can be incubated in a Big Coop.

name: Duck Egg
obtainMethod: Produced by Ducks in a Big Coop
description: A cream-colored egg from a duck.

name: Duck Feather
obtainMethod: Produced occasionally by very happy Ducks in a Big Coop
description: A lucky feather dropped by a happy duck.

name: Egg
obtainMethod: Produced by Chickens in a Coop
description: A regular egg from a happy chicken.

name: Goat Milk
obtainMethod: Produced by Goats in a Big Barn (use Milk Pail)
description: A pitcher of rich goat's milk.

name: Golden Egg
description: A very rare and special egg with a solid gold shell.
obtainMethod: Produced by Golden Chickens after Perfection, bought from Marnie's Ranch or Qi's Walnut Room, witch event, or rare fishing treasure chest
location: Farm (Coop), Marnie's Ranch, Qi's Walnut Room

name: Large Egg
obtainMethod: Produced by very happy Chickens (high hearts) in a Coop
description: An exceptionally large egg from a very happy chicken.

name: Large Goat Milk
obtainMethod: Produced by very happy Goats (high hearts) in a Big Barn
description: A large pitcher of rich goat's milk.

name: Large Milk
obtainMethod: Produced by very happy Cows (high hearts) in a Barn
description: A large jug of fresh cow's milk from a very happy cow.

name: Milk
obtainMethod: Produced by Cows in a Barn (use Milk Pail)
description: A jug of fresh cow's milk.

name: Ostrich Egg
description: It may be the world's largest egg.
obtainMethod: Produced by Ostriches, obtained from Journal Scrap #10 on Ginger Island, or found in Volcano Dungeon rare chests

name: Rabbit's Foot
obtainMethod: Produced occasionally by happy Rabbits in a Deluxe Coop
description: It's said to bring good luck. Clearly not for the rabbit, though.

name: Roe
description: Fresh fish eggs. These can be aged in a preserves jar to bring out more flavor.
obtainMethod: Produced by fish in Fish Ponds, or found in Fishing Treasure Chests after obtaining the Jewels Of The Sea book power

name: Slime Ball
description: A large ball of compressed slime collected from a Slime Hutch.
obtainMethod: Produced inside a Slime Hutch when enough slimes are living there

name: Truffle
obtainMethod: Foraged outdoors by Pigs in a Deluxe Barn
description: A rare mushroom-like fungus prized by gourmet chefs. Found by pigs.

name: Void Egg
obtainMethod: Produced by Void Chickens (hatched from Void Egg purchased from Witch/Krobus)
description: An egg with a very dark shell and deep purple interior.

name: Wool
obtainMethod: Produced by Sheep in a Deluxe Barn (use Shears)
description: Soft, fluffy wool sheared from a happy sheep.
